name: root-measure
description: Guided Codex workflows for root image measurement, install verification, transparent run artifacts, and optional expected-CSV comparison.

interface.shortDescription: Measure root images, inspect outputs, and verify installs with guided RhizoVision Explorer workflows.
interface.longDescription: Root Measure helps Codex install, verify, and run root image measurement workflows. It provides a guided setup for user data, strict release checks for local plugin installs, validated toolchain checks, transparent artifacts, features.csv inspection, viewer.html links, raw rv.exe passthrough, and expected-CSV comparison for public-data reproduction.
defaultPrompt: Analyze a root-image folder with Root Measure
启动 Root Measure 分析向导
诊断 Root Measure 安装并运行 release-check
